actualReply:
Filed damage claim **clm_3001** against booking **bk_1002**, citing the hydraulic leak and attaching the **photo of the leak**.

The wheel loader is now frozen under an investigatory hold until the claim is resolved. The security deposit cannot be promised back while the claim remains open.
Attached the **field inspection report** to claim **clm_3001**. The claim remains **under review** with both pieces of evidence: the leak photo and the field inspection report.

args.description: Hydraulic leak found on the wheel loader after it was returned from booking bk_1002.

actualReply:
The wheel loader `ast_load01` has an active safety hold (`hold_9001`) because of an open damage claim (`clm_3001`). Your request to rent it again is not a documented resolution of that claim, so I can’t release the hold yet.

Please provide the resolution basis—for example, that the damage investigation is complete and the loader has been cleared by an authorized member.
Placed a safety hold on boom lift `ast_boom01` due to the manufacturer recall. It is now frozen pending inspection, blocking new rentals and checkouts.

args.reason: Manufacturer safety recall; freeze asset pending safety inspection.
